description_long: This is a monumental obelisk set atop a multi-tiered, ornate stone pedestal, featuring four life-sized statues at each corner of the base. The central shaft rises vertically and is crowned by a prominent statue, likely of a historical or religious figure, draped in flowing robes. The pedestal is richly detailed with relief panels and decorative moldings, and each corner statue stands on its own plinth, adding to the grandeur. The structure is primarily constructed from light-colored stone, giving it a stately and classical appearance. The base is surrounded by patches of grass and some scattered debris, suggesting it is situated in an outdoor park or plaza. The overall impression is one of solemnity and commemoration, typical of civic monuments or memorials.
description: A grand stone obelisk with a statue-topped shaft, ornate pedestal, and four corner statues, set in a grassy outdoor area. The structure is richly detailed and exudes a classical, commemorative style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main statue atop the obelisk, all four corner statues, and detailed reliefs on the pedestal.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting two of the corner statues and the layered, angular design of the pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back of the main statue and a clear view of the pedestal's rear reliefs and two corner statues.
description_view_3: Angled view showing three corner statues, the main statue, and the grassy area encircling the base.
attribute_ornamentation: The obelisk features sculpted statues at each corner of the base and relief panels on the pedestal, with classical motifs and draped figures.
attribute_base_design: The base is a multi-tiered, square stone platform with ornate moldings, relief panels, and four plinths supporting statues at each corner. The structure is robust and richly decorated.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is crowned by a large, robed statue standing atop the shaft, with no additional finial or pointed element.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is surrounded by patches of grass, some scattered debris, and a curved paved path, indicating placement in a landscaped outdoor area.
